{{Quote|He became one with the Force long ago.|[[Drakka Judarrl]]|<ref name="AED" />}}
This individual was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Surviving the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Drakka Judarrl]], this Master was eventually found and executed by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|We went into hiding. I was much younger then, still only a Padawan. My master helped many members of the Senate escape the Empire's persecution. It was a dark time. Darth Vader eventually caught up with my master.|Drakka Judarrl, to a spacer|<ref name="AED" />}}
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], this individual was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Selecting [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Drakka Judarrl]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], the pair served the Order in some capacity during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Surviving the war, the Master-Padawan pair went to ground as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] emerged and successfully initiated a [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="AED" />

Helpless to assist as hundreds of their peers were hunted down and slaughtered by the Empire, which was controlled by a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], the pair assisted many members of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] escape persecution; an act which drew the attention of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Eventually hunted down, Vader slew the Jedi Master but was unable to catch Judarrl. The young [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] escaped Vader with the assistance of a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who had been aiding her master; the pair fled to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] where Judarrl would take up residence in the basements of a destroyed [[Jedi Enclave|Jedi academy]].<ref name="AED" />
